title: They Were Sisters
writer: Dorothy Whipple, Katherine Strueby, Roland Pertwee
actors: Phyllis Calvert, James Mason, Hugh Sinclair
plot: The story of three sisters and the men they marry. One is happily married but childless; the second promiscuously escapes an unhappy, loveless marriage; the third is tortured by the mental cruelties inflicted by a domineering husb...
